# Review start command result

JSON output for `harness review start`.

- Schema JSON: [review.start.result.schema.json](../../../../schema/commands/review.start.result.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.ReviewStartResult`

## Root Shape

ReviewStartResult is the JSON result returned by `harness review start`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `artifacts` | `ReviewStartArtifacts` | no | Artifacts points to the created review artifacts for the round. |
| `command` | `string` | yes | Command is the stable command identifier for the result payload. |
| `errors` | `array<ErrorDetail>` | no | Errors lists hard failures that prevented the command from succeeding. |
| `next_actions` | `array<NextAction> | null` | yes | NextAction lists the most relevant follow-up steps in priority order. |
| `ok` | `boolean` | yes | OK reports whether the command succeeded. |
| `summary` | `string` | yes | Summary is the concise human-readable outcome description. |

## Definitions

## ErrorDetail

ErrorDetail describes one machine-readable validation or execution problem in a command result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | `string` | yes | Message is the human-readable explanation of the problem. |
| `path` | `string` | yes | Path identifies the field, section, or artifact path associated with the error. |

## NextAction

NextAction describes one concrete follow-up action that the caller should consider after reading a command result.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `command` | `string | null` | yes | Command is the suggested command line to run next when the next step is best expressed as a harness command. |
| `description` | `string` | yes | Description explains the suggested next step in plain language. |

## ReviewManifestSlot

ReviewManifestSlot describes one reviewer submission slot in a review manifest.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `instructions` | `string` | yes | Instructions is the reviewer prompt for this slot. |
| `name` | `string` | yes | Name is the human-readable dimension label. |
| `slot` | `string` | yes | Slot is the stable slot identifier. |
| `submission_path` | `string` | yes | SubmissionPath is the target path for this slot's submission artifact. |

## ReviewStartArtifacts

ReviewStartArtifacts lists the review artifacts created by `harness review start`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `aggregate_path` | `string` | yes | AggregatePath is the path to the review aggregate artifact. |
| `ledger_path` | `string` | yes | LedgerPath is the path to the review ledger artifact. |
| `local_state_path` | `string` | yes | LocalStatePath is the plan-local state cache path. |
| `manifest_path` | `string` | yes | ManifestPath is the path to the review manifest artifact. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | yes | PlanPath is the current plan path associated with the review round. |
| `round_id` | `string` | yes | RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round. |
| `slots` | `array<ReviewManifestSlot> | null` | yes | Slots lists the materialized review slots created for the round. |

ReviewStartResult is the JSON result returned by `harness review start`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
